recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Has Been Found
recommendations.overview: The second part of the Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
recommendations.overview: In a world where walking, talking, digitally connected bots have become children's best friends, an 11-year-old finds that his robot buddy doesn't quite work the same as the others do.

recommendations.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
recommendations.overview: The spirited Boruto Uzumaki, son of Seventh Hokage Naruto, is a skilled ninja who possesses the same brashness and passion his father once had. However, the constant absence of his father, who is busy with his Hokage duties, puts a damper on Boruto's

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.

recommendations.title: Vivre Sa Vie
recommendations.overview: Twelve episodic tales in the life of a Parisian woman and her slow descent into prostitution.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: Santa Claus Is a Stinker
recommendations.overview: Two neurotics, working for a suicide hotline on the night of Christmas Eve, get caught up in a catastrophe when a pregnant woman, her abusive boyfriend, and a transvestite visit their office.

recommendations.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
recommendations.overview: Famed swordsman and poet Cyrano de Bergerac is in love with his cousin Roxane. He has never expressed his love for her as he his large nose undermines his self-confidence. Then he finds a way to express his love to her, indirectly.

recommendations.title: A Woman Is a Woman
recommendations.overview: Longing for a baby, a stripper pursues another man in order to make her boyfriend jealous.
